issues.description: Condition should check if Leader IS Sanji (LeaderIsName), not if Sanji card is on board (HasCardOnBoard). These are different game states.
Missing condition: must have 4 or more DON!! cards attached. Should be HasAttachedDon with count >= 4.
Action type SearchDeck is incorrect. Should be PlayFromHand (or PlaySelf if self-referential). Text says 'play up to 1 [Sanji]' from hand or trash, not search deck.
Missing power filter. Must restrict to Sanji with 6000 power or less.
Destination should allow play from 'hand' or 'trash', not only one source.
Second effect (Trigger with DrawCard + TrashFromHand) has no basis in card text. This entire effect should be removed.
Missing 'count' constraint: 'up to 1' means max 1 card can be played.
